_about: i18n message catalog for Plato. Add new strings here under a namespace, then read them in components via useTranslations('namespace'). Server components: import {getTranslations} from 'next-intl/server'. Keys use snake_case; values are user-facing English copy. To add a new locale, copy this file to messages/<code>.json, add the code to src/i18n/config.ts locales tuple, and update getRequestConfig in src/i18n/request.ts to resolve the requested locale. Migrated components (read strings via useTranslations): components/shell/sidebar.tsx (nav), components/shell/topbar.tsx (topbar — ARIA labels only so far; project name, cost/token counters, run-control labels and Row 2 filter buttons remain hardcoded pending follow-up). Pending migration: components/shell/tab-pills.tsx (filter labels), components/ui/confirm-dialog.tsx (defaults still use hardcoded 'Confirm'/'Cancel' fallbacks — callers should pass i18n strings via the dialogs.* / common.* keys), and any per-page strings under app/. New components should reach for the actions.* and dialogs.* namespaces before hardcoding.

errors.connection_lost: Connection lost — events may be incomplete
